# Luxvibe

> Luxvibe is a luxury hotel booking platform that helps travelers discover and book premium hotels, boutique resorts, and unique stays worldwide.

## What Luxvibe Does

Luxvibe aggregates hotel inventory from over 2.6 million properties worldwide and presents them with:
- Real-time pricing and availability
- AI-powered vibe search (describe your ideal stay in plain language)
- AI concierge "Luxe" for personalized recommendations
- Advanced filtering (stars, amenities, price, distance, rating)
- Side-by-side hotel comparison
- Wishlist / favorites management
- Instant booking confirmation
- Full booking management and transactional email receipts

## Who It Is For

Luxvibe is designed for travelers who value quality and experience over price alone — those seeking luxury hotels, boutique properties, spa retreats, beach resorts, and curated city stays.

## Key Destinations

Las Vegas, New York, Miami, Los Angeles, Paris, London, Dubai, Chicago, San Francisco, Barcelona, Rome, Tokyo, Bali, Bangkok, Sydney, Amsterdam, Lisbon, Cancún, Orlando, Maldives.

## Technology

- Built with React, TypeScript, and Node.js/Express
- Hotel data powered by LiteAPI (2.6M+ properties worldwide)
- AI search and concierge powered by Anthropic Claude
- Secure payments via LiteAPI booking SDK

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://luxvibe.io
- Sitemap: https://luxvibe.io/sitemap.xml
- Email: support@luxvibe.io
